response: Hershel Greene and Carl Grimes appear in the comic book series **"The Walking Dead"**. This is the primary comic book upon which the television series is based. In both the comic book and the television series, Hershel Greene is the widowed owner of a farm in Georgia and is a devout Christian who remains fiercely protective of his large family. Carl Grimes is the son of Rick Grimes and is one of the longest-surviving characters in the series, having been introduced in **"The Walking Dead" #2** in 2003.
